headline: 1 Value Stock to Consider Right Now and 2 We Find Risky
summary: The low valuation multiples for value stocks provide a margin of safety that growth stocks rarely offer. However, the challenge lies in determining whether these cheap assets are genuinely undervalued or simply on sale due to their potentially deteriorating business models.

headline: B. Riley Cuts Target Price on Go Daddy (GDDY) to $215
summary: GoDaddy Inc. (NYSE:GDDY) is one of the 14 Most Undervalued NYSE Stocks to Buy According to Analysts. B. Riley, on February 25, cut its target price on GoDaddy by 11.6% to $215 but retained the firm’s Buy recommendation on the stock. This target price update comes on the heels of GoDaddy’s Q4 2025 results, which […]
